title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer, Part 1.
summaries:
"The Adventures of Tom Sawyer, Part 1." by Mark Twain is a novel published in 1876.

Tom Sawyer, a mischievous orphan in 1830s Missouri, navigates childhood along the Mississippi River with his friend Huckleberry Finn. What begins as innocent pranks and romantic pursuits takes a dark turn when the boys witness a murder in a graveyard. Sworn to secrecy, they must balance their carefree adventures with the weight of a terrible truth, all while a dangerous criminal lurks nearby. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
